## Summary

Describe the change in one or two sentences. Reference the issue this PR resolves (for example, `Closes #123`).

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint` clean
- [ ] `npm test` green
- [ ] `npm run test:ui` green (when editor UI is affected)
- [ ] `npm run test:docker` green (when packaging or installed-path behavior is affected)
- [ ] `README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`, or `docs/` updated where user-visible behavior changes

## Notes for the reviewer

Anything that is not obvious from the diff — design choices, trade-offs, open questions.
